headline: How Innovation is Strengthening Helen of Troy's Brand Portfolio
summary: HELE is boosting its brands with new products, AI tools and social commerce efforts as innovation shapes consumer engagement.

headline: 3 Top Dividend Stocks to Maximize Your Retirement Income
summary: The traditional ways to plan for your retirement may mean income can no longer cover expenses post-employment. But what if there was another option that could provide a steady, reliable source of income in your nest egg years?

raw.headline: 3 Top Dividend Stocks to Maximize Your Retirement Income
raw.summary: The traditional ways to plan for your retirement may mean income can no longer cover expenses post-employment. But what if there was another option that could provide a steady, reliable source of income in your nest egg years?

headline: Why Hasbro’s Gina Goetter sees finance and operations as one role
summary: As both CFO and COO, Goetter says the two functions are now inseparable, requiring leaders to set up frameworks to handle dual responsibilities, develop talent and help drive decision-making.

raw.headline: Why Hasbro’s Gina Goetter sees finance and operations as one role
raw.summary: As both CFO and COO, Goetter says the two functions are now inseparable, requiring leaders to set up frameworks to handle dual responsibilities, develop talent and help drive decision-making.
